entry.title: TCS calculating as per singular invoice value rather than Cummulative invoices
entry.content:
Hello all,

We are in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition environment for India localization. We have maintained the TCS configs as per the SAP suggested but the calculation for TCS is only if a single invoice value crosses the threshold limit (in our case-50,00,000) and not considering all the previous invoices posted.

The configurations done by me are as follows:-

1. Maintained access sequence ZDU1 after creating new condition table for the same.

2. Assigned the same for the Condition type JTC1 :-

3. Further we have maintained a condition record for condition types JTCB and JTC1 :-

 We have further maintained all identification numbers:

  • IN3 - GSTIN
  • AADHAR - AADHAR NUMBER
  • PAN - PAN NUMBER

even after such configurations we have initially posted 3 invoices as follws

1. Amount:- Rs. 19,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

2. Amount:- Rs. 19,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

3. Amount:- Rs. 10,00,000 (did not calculate TCS)

as the cumulative billing document posted amount to Rs. 48,00,000 and we have maintained a threshold limit of Rs. 50,00,000 we further posted a 4th billing document. we have maintained the TCS Threshold Fiscal Year wise.

4. Amount:- Rs. 10,00,000 (still did not calculate TCS)

 

 

Kindly guide if any other configurations are to be done. As this is very crucial for India Localization.

 

Thanks

entry.title: India - Backup Book of Accounts (MCA requirement) - KBA 3309423
entry.content:
Resolution referred to in KBA 3309423 re  
(1) Data Extraction     and
(2) Business Analytical Reports
is very generic and does not offer any solution.
What SAP objects & reports do constitute 'Book of Accounts' in line with Section 128 of the Companies Act 2013 resp Rule 3 of the Companies (Accounts) Rules, 2014? 
'... Amended Rule 3(5) requires companies to maintain the backup of the books of accounts and other relevant books and papers in an electronic mode on servers physically located in India on a daily basis (earlier periodic basis), even in cases where such backups are maintained at a place outside India. The amendment draws reference to maintaining backups on a daily basis ...'.
Anybody does have any suggestions and/or solutions implemented in their environment (SAP ERP hosted in Germany and backup/data extraction/reports ... required at our India locations as per above)?
Any suggestions are highly welcome!
Thanks in advance & Kind regards,
Hubert

entry.title: Sales orders are not displayed in COGS
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

User has informed, many Sales orders are not displayed in COGS. For Sales Order , I Used VA03 to display Sales Order. For COGS, which T.code should i use? If the sales Order are not avilable in COGS, how to post them so that sales orders are displayed in COGS?

All the help will be greatly appreicated.

Regards

Sridhar

entry.title: Default "Display as List option" in FBV3
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

If a document is parked using BAPI, when the user displays it in FBV3 or FBV2 it displays as Classic Display. Is there a setting or parameter (like FB00) that can default the display as ALV Classic?

Regards,

Vivek

Aswanth

entry.title: List of G/L accounts with FCV enabled
entry.content: Hi, How could I get a list of G/l accounts with FCV enabled? Please advise..Thanks..

entry.title: How many days it takes to decide the organisation structure of the company
entry.content: Usually how many days it takes to decide organisation structure of the company.

entry.title: Production Variance Analysis Report
entry.content:
Hi

I use COOIS to look at production order variance. I usually enter order numbers, then go in order by order to Goto > Costs > Analysis. I need info such as Variance, Price Variance, Qty Variance, Total Target Costs, Total/Actual Qtys, and Resource-usage var.

This process is very time consuming as there are 60+ orders a day. Is there a way to access this information and export it all in one report? My team is not sure if this is possible but it would be very helpful.

entry.title: How do I make the file extension automatic for a specific bank in transaction F110?
entry.content:
After running the APP in F110, I selected a medium media, it showed an item that did the payment. after clicking the Edit button on the menu item, then clicking Download. It then displays a file. The file format is .txt I need to change the file format to ".BGI" for a specific bank. Because I want to upload this file to the bank. so the file must be in .BGI format.
How do I make the file extension automatic for a specific bank?

 

Best regards Plamen

entry.title: Need to do GST validation for vendor in F-43
entry.content:
Hi,

In F-43 need to validate GST for vendors. If user select other state vendor and if they select CGST/SGST instead of IGST need to show error message.

entry.title: vendor with multiple purchaze nature
entry.content:
Hello experts,

A lot of our vendors supply ordinary goods and immobilizations in the same time. But we have different recon accounts for those two types. What is the standard configuration for this?

Regards,

Aziz

entry.title: How to extend CNSETTLRULE to include COPA Fields?
entry.content:
CNSETTLERULE report doesn't have COPA characteristics fields. How to extend CNSETTLERULE report to display the below listed fields:

Table: CE4GM00_ACCT / CE4GM00

Unit of Measure
Trading Partner
Sold-to Country
Producing Plant
Product Type
Product Line
Other
Sales Program
Country of Origin


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: F110 single payment ageist multipal invoice
entry.content:
Dear Sir,

Users use F110 then the Business Area document is posted, but users are required to single payment for multiple invoices ( any business Area)

Thanks & Regards

Subodh Kumar

9586051171

entry.title: Problem with 2023 year-end in fixed asset accounting
entry.content: We need to close the year 2023 in fixed asset accounting, but the system indicates that it is not possible because not all periodic operations have been accounted for. After the review, we found that the accounting for asset retirement in the month of December 2023 failed, for a specific valuation area (non-principal area). Since the 2023 accounting is already closed, and we are not allowed to open it, is there a way to open only the non-primary ledger to record the asset withdrawal? Is it possible to post the retirement of the 2023 asset in this year 2024 and subsequently close the year 2023 for fixed assets?

entry.title: S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 Reports Errors
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

T-code S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 and S_ALR_87012284 turns out to be totally different figures，And only the result of S_ALR_87012284 is correct，the result of S_PL0_86000030 and S_PL0_86000028 are wrong. I am in ECC version.

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.content:
hi team

greetings!!

 

Posting period 010 is not defined for fiscal year variant R4 how to solve this error

Aswanth

entry.title: definition of sap paramter ID NLRDNB
entry.content:
For which Process or solution is this parameter in the additional parameters for global parameters based on company codes used?

based on creation of new company codes by using the copy function I see data in the settings, after the upgrade to S4 2021 SP01 I now receive an error as the data field length set up is changed. (from 8 digits now to 4 digits)

thanks in advance for any info or comment
